reason: The remediation modifies only the pam_pwquality configuration to enforce a maximum number of consecutive repeating characters in passwords. This is a standard PAM password‑policy adjustment that does not affect system boot, networking, or filesystem layout and is unlikely to lock out users if applied correctly.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Improper value could make the policy too strict and cause legitimate password changes to be rejected; Empty or missing value may unintentionally weaken the policy
